name: BBQ Ribs 1991 World BBQ/Dry Rub Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry rub ingredients in a jar and shake well to combine.
2. Sprinkle the rub liberally on ribs and let stand at room temperature for 20-30 minutes until the rub appears wet.
3. Prepare the smoker using hickory chips for flavor. Cook ribs, bone side down, at 230°F for 2 hours using indirect heat.
4. Turn the ribs and cook for an additional hour.
5. During the last 15 minutes of cooking, baste with BBQ sauce diluted by half with water.
6. Serve ribs with warm undiluted sauce on the side.
Winner: David Burks
